package rulecoverage

func NegativeNoStreamingForLargeExportHandler() string {
    ruleID := "no_streaming_for_large_export_handler"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Large list or export handlers that materialize everything before writing rather than using chunked or streaming output."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
